name: Cedar Woods Properties Limited
analysis: CWP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$7.0500, stop A$6.4944, target A$7.8014 (1.35:1) — then trail it.
